title: Chusua joo-iokiana
taxonomy: Chusua joo-iokiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a part of the genus Chusua, which is native to New Zealand. The exact classification of Chusua joo-iokiana may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the angiosperm clade. Chusua joo-iokiana is often grouped together with other species of the Gesneriaceae family, which are commonly known as African violets or gesneriads. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and its evolutionary relationships with other species in the same family.
